div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: all refs drop to 0 + LRU expired

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FREE
in LRU eviction queue
refCount = 0, schedulingRefCount = 0
may or may not be in prefix tree

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ALLOCATED
claimed by one sequence
refCount = 1
loadOrAllocateBlocks() writes KV data

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CACHED in prefix tree
storeBlocks() links block under parent
mPrevBlock != nullptr
mNextBlocks keyed by BlockKey

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SHARED
cache hit by a second sequence
refCount > 1
read-only, cannot be evicted

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PARTIAL REUSE
incoming BlockKey partially matches cached key
numMatchingTokens > 0 but less than tokensPerBlock
fork: copy-on-write or steal the leaf

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Copy path
new block allocated
partial KV data copied from matched block
mCopyOnPartialReuse = true

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Steal path
matched leaf unlinked from tree
freeLeafBlock() via removeNextBlock()
mCopyOnPartialReuse = false

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GPU Pool (primary)
KVCacheBlockPool::primaryPtr
shape: max_blocks × layers × 2 × heads × T × D
CUDA kernel reads via KVBlockArray

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CPU Pool (secondary)
KVCacheBlockPool::secondaryPtr
pinned host memory
indexed by same mMemoryPoolBlockIndex

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OFFLOADED
KVCacheTransferManager::offload()
async GPU-to-CPU DMA
slot freed in GPU pool

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ONBOARDING
KVCacheTransferManager::onboard()
async CPU-to-GPU DMA
triggered on cache hit for offloaded block

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EVICT from tree
LRU removes lowest-priority free block
freeLeafBlock() sets mPrevBlock = nullptr
priority refreshed by mDurationMs expiry
